name: ifq-design-skills
description: IFQ Design Skills — skill package for AI coding agents (Anthropic/OpenAI SKILL.md format). This package.json declares the runtime dependencies needed by the skill's scripts (render-video / export-pptx / export-pdf / verify). Installing the skill DOES NOT install these automatically — run `npm install` in this directory (or install peers globally) before running scripts.
author: ifq.ai

systemRequirements.ffmpeg: >=4.4  (required for video/GIF export; install via `brew install ffmpeg` on macOS or `apt install ffmpeg` on Debian/Ubuntu)
systemRequirements.chromium: installed via `npx playwright install chromium` after npm install
